strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source AI/ML tooling (MCP, GISCollective)
Proven leadership in technical innovation through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-stack development
concerns: No explicit evidence of cloud platform strategy or AI product ownership at scale
Lack of Master's/PhD in AI-related field, missing preferred qualification
Limited documentation of direct customer advisory or strategic partner engagement in AI/cloud
response.justification: The candidate has 15+ years of hands-on engineering experience with clear AI-agent infrastructure contributions (MCP code generators) and open-source AI/ML tooling (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts), fulfilling the core requirement of AI builder fluency. However, there is no evidence of cloud product strategy leadership, customer advisory roles, or AI platform ownership at scale, which are critical for the director-level IC role. The absence of a Master's/PhD in AI is a gap but not disqualifying given the depth of practical experience.
